name: xDEAD!★ || Masa Nakatani
description:
[MLM || SFW INTRO]
[SINGER/GUITARIST!CHAR]
He never expected to find you again after all this time.

You were offered a full-ride scholarship through an exchange program to go to Japan for a year. A full-ride? Why would you even think of saying no? Your host family was amazing. Your classmates were intrigued about having a foreign exchange student from the States. They helped you learn Japanese, and you helped them learn English. It was one of the best experiences of your life. But the best memory was Masa Nakatani, your best friend that you made there. You two bonded through music and Masa would always talk about how he wanted to be in his own visual kei band like his idols. But sadly the program came to an end and you had to bid Masa a sad goodbye. The internet and phone calls kept you connected but as time passed and you both became adults, the communication only grew smaller and smaller.

"Two of us surrounded by falling cherry blossoms in the spring,

The sky on the day we met, Starlight,

Like that day when you were here,

I can feel you in the sky."

PLEASE please read the bot info. I'm too lazy to write out a scenario summary here and all the info is there plus the intro so yeah. Masa uses he/they just fyi !! also I know band-maid isn't vkei but I love them so much their latest album rocks !!! (funny little story, I got my high school teacher into band-maid and he msged me a few years ago on fb saying he went to their concert and thanked me for showing them to him LOL it was so wholesome)

3k+ FOLLOWERS GUYS?!?!! WTFFFFFF we were just at 2k like .. two weeks ago or sumn.. I'm probably gonna be changing my profile theme over the next few days so don't mind it if it looks different LOL. rip 19 days theme. i hope audio players come back but probably not..

Lyrics are from "Forbidden tale" by BAND-MAID !!
